panel.title: Workspace Chat
panel.composerPlaceholder: Enter your request. AI will read project state and choose the right tools.
panel.errorHint: Download the log and include the requestId for debugging, or retry the same instruction.
panel.modeDescriptionPlan: Stay in analysis and planning first
panel.assistantHint: The general assistant reads project state first, then calls screenplay, edit table, asset, video, or render tools as needed.

debugContext.title: Full Raw Context
debugContext.subtitle: Shows the uncompressed UIMessage record retained in this browser for debugging each sent turn, tool call, and structured event.
debugContext.empty: There is no raw context to inspect yet.

autoFollowUp.taskCompleted: Background task {operation} completed (taskId: {taskId}). Read the latest project state and task result first, then decide the next production step. Do not assume the result. If the next step writes data or may bill usage, request confirmation under the current rules.
autoFollowUp.taskFailed: Background task {operation} failed (taskId: {taskId}). Read the latest project state and task error, then explain the failure and the actionable next step to the user.
autoFollowUp.batchCompleted: Background batch task {operation} completed ({total} tasks). Read the latest project state and task results first, then decide the next production step. Do not assume the result. If the next step writes data or may bill usage, request confirmation under the current rules.
autoFollowUp.batchFailed: Background batch task {operation} finished with {failed}/{total} failures. Read the latest project state and task errors, then explain the failure scope and actionable next step to the user.
autoFollowUp.waitCompleted: The system detected that background task {operation} completed ({total} total). Call get_project_context first to read the latest project state and task result, then summarize for the user. Do not poll task status directly.
autoFollowUp.waitFailed: The system detected that background task {operation} finished: {success} succeeded and {failed}/{total} failed. Call get_project_context first to read the latest project state and task errors, then handle only failed items or explain why to abandon them. Do not redo successful items or poll task status directly.

toolConfig.title: Configure Tools
toolConfig.description: Checkboxes only affect the eligible tool pool. The backend still trims tools by routing and Top-N injection.
toolConfig.selectedSummary: {count} selected in current view. Eligible does not mean injected every turn.

cards.undoConfirmSingle: Undo this change? This may overwrite or delete newly generated content.
cards.undoConfirmBatch: Undo this batch change? This may overwrite or delete newly generated content.
cards.approvedPlan: Approved the {workflow} plan and started execution.
cards.cancelledOperation: Rejected operation {operation}. The system will not continue executing it.
